title: Spooky Brown MDF Skull Coaster Set - 0.6cm x 9cm (Pack of 4) - Creepy Design - Perfect for Halloween & Gothic Home Decor
features: CREEPY DESIGN: Add a touch of spine-chilling ambiance to your home with our spooky brown MDF skull coaster set, featuring exquisite skull detailing that enhances the overall macabre aesthetic.

HIGH-QUALITY MATERIAL: Crafted from durable MDF with a thickness of 0.6cm, this 9cm coaster set is designed to protect your surfaces from scratches, spills, and heat damage while maintaining a top-notch appearance.
GOTHIC HOME DECOR: Elevate your interior design with this unique, dark-themed accessory, perfect for those who appreciate a Gothic touch; seamlessly blending style and function.

PERFECT FOR HALLOWEEN: Reinvent your spooky seasonal celebrations by incorporating these frightful skull coasters into your Halloween party, making it a memorable and spine-tingling experience for your guests.

VERSATILE DECOR ELEMENT: Not only limited to Halloween, these intricately designed coasters are ideal for year-round use, proving to be an attention-grabbing conversation piece for visitors and friends alike.
description: DESCRIPTION: Premium quality coaster set designed with a skull in grey color a unique style for serving beverages.
